name: Excellent Pizza Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in bowl and mix until a dough forms.
2. Set the mixer to DOUGH cycle.
3. Remove the dough from the machine.
4. Sprinkle cornmeal on a 12-inch nonstick pan.
5. Place the dough in the center of the pan.
6. Lightly sprinkle water over the top of the dough.
7. Cover the pan with a towel and let it rise for 25 minutes at room temperature.
8. Preheat the oven to 475°F.
9. Press the dough evenly across the bottom of the pan.
10. Add sauce and toppings.
11. Bake on the bottom rack for 11 to 13 minutes, or until the crust is fully cooked (dark brown) in the center.
